titleStmt.title: SII 38.478: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 478. (A.R. No. 478 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the south wall, maṇḍapa, infront of the central shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of land, 3 mā, kāṇi in extent by Vantoṇḍa mudaliyār to the god Tiruttuṟaippūṇḍi-uḍaiya-nāyanār as tirunāmattukkāṇi. The nagarattār was pleased to exempt the land from taxes with the libation of water from the 18th regnal year and the transaction was engraved on stone. The accountant of the nagaram, Muttogai-uḍaiyāṉ and the accountant of the ūr Iṟaiyākuḍaiyāṉ, figure as the signatories to this transaction.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ ci �Read cirājarāja
catevarkku yāṇṭu 10 8ra Uṭaiyār tiru
ttuṟaipūṇṭi Uṭaiya
nāyaṉārkku Uttamaco
ḻapurattu tirunāmattuk
kāṇiyāka UṇRead vaṉtoṇ
ṭa mutaliyār kuṭutta nilam
tiripuvaṉamātevikku te
ṟkku Irācentiracoḻa
vāykkālukku meṟkku ca
2catirattu ruṭapa8m Itaṉ ki
ḻakku 3ca 4 catirattu » (1/4)mā
m Āka » mūṉṟumā 8 Innila
muṉṟu mākkāṇikku
m tarappaṭiyum vanta
maṭakku 10�ña pācaṉa
mutal Iṟaiyiliyā
ka nirvāttuvateṉṟu
nakarattār Aruḷaccey
tārkaḷ Innāḷ muta
l Iṟaiyiliyāka niṟ
kka paṇṇukutu patiṉeṭṭā
vatu kāril variyaṟṟa maṭakkil
kuṟaiyātoḻintu Ippaṭi kal
lile veṭṭuvatu Ivai nakarak
kaṇakkumuttokaiuṭaiyāṉ
Eḻuttu Ivūrkaṇakku Iṟaiyākuṭaiyāṉ

Digital edition of SII 38.478 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
